context: Checkpoint 2026-04-30T22:03Z after another atomic product/extensibility slice. current_tasks: Latest remote-pushed/CI-green baseline remains 4e02e548 `refactor(homestead): scope surface context providers` unless pushed later.

Local commits ahead of origin/develop now include: 1f980843 `feat(app-dev): prove registry validated surfaces`; 6c54c16c `chore(backlog): note e2e pipeline speedups`; 109bd170 `feat(homestead): share plugin registry helper`; e5ce03ee `chore(project): checkpoint registry surface flow`; 8c2ec2ac `feat(homestead): dispatch surface host actions`; dfd2b65f `refactor(homestead): scope surface action handlers`; 5e77390b `docs(homestead): clarify studio primitive boundary`; dce97ebd `chore(project): checkpoint surface action primitives`; 85f81667 `feat(homestead): inspect surface action diagnostics`.

85f81667 added semantic Homestead surface action diagnostics: `HOMESTEAD_SURFACE_ACTION_EVENTS`, `isHomesteadSurfaceActionEvent(...)`, `homesteadSurfaceActionFromTelemetry(...)`, and `listHomesteadSurfaceActions(...)` in `@refarm.dev/homestead/sdk/surface-inspector`. These parse `ui:surface_action_requested` and `ui:surface_action_failed` telemetry into read-only diagnostics.

apps/dev `/surfaces` ledger now consumes Homestead action diagnostics and renders action rows plus an action metric. Reactive ledger refresh now persists action telemetry events as they arrive, while keeping presenter/table rendering in apps/dev and semantic interpretation in Homestead SDK.
Documentation updated in `docs/EXTENSIBILITY_MODEL.md` to mention action requested/failed diagnostics in the Studio ledger loop.

Reverted it with `git restore` to respect the repo instruction to avoid large autoformat diffs in Shell.test. Do not reattempt there unless using a surgical approach that preserves formatting.
